description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this high coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with double layered moulded cups that ensure a smooth look and a criss cross Fit construction which supports and lifts the contours. A cut that offers exemplary comfort makes it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for daily wear.Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfortDouble layered moulded cups and criss cross fit construction for perfect shaping and styleBeautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
